summary: Iteration 129: Complete testing of PvP Infrastructure System (HQ page). All 21 backend tests passed. Frontend HQ page fully functional with 3 division cards (Investigative, Operative, Legal), player stats display, upgrade buttons with proper disabled states, legal history toggle, and navigation link in navbar.
critical_code_review_comments: pvp.py correctly implements all 6 PvP endpoints with proper authentication and error handling
Division upgrade requirements properly validated (level, fame, funds, CinePass, investigative_level for legal)
HqPage.jsx correctly displays all 3 divisions with level badges, daily limits, upgrade costs
Upgrade buttons correctly disabled when requirements not met with clear 'Bloccato' badge
Legal history toggle works with AnimatePresence animation
App.js correctly imports HqPage and adds route at /hq with Swords icon in navbar
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user. Player at level 0, fame 50, so upgrade requirements correctly fail.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PvP Infrastructure System fully implemented and tested. Key verified features: 1) GET /api/pvp/status returns all 3 divisions with levels, daily limits, upgrade costs, requirements. 2) POST /api/pvp/upgrade correctly validates requirements (investigative needs level 3, operative needs level 2, legal needs level 5 + fame 60 + investigative lv1). 3) POST /api/pvp/investigate, /api/pvp/counter-boycott, /api/pvp/legal-action all correctly fail when division level is 0. 4) GET /api/pvp/legal-history returns empty actions array for new users. 5) HQ page at /hq shows 3 division cards with proper styling (cyan/orange/purple), player stats (fame, level, funds, CinePass), upgrade buttons disabled with 'Bloccato' badge, legal history toggle, and 'Come Funziona' info section. 6) HQ nav link appears in hamburger menu as 'Quartier Generale' with Swords icon.

backend_pvp_status.returns: divisions object with investigative/operative/legal, player_fame, player_level, funds, cinepass, pending_legal_actions

backend_pvp_upgrade.validation: Checks level, fame, funds, CinePass, investigative_level requirements
backend_pvp_upgrade.error_messages: Italian error messages (Richiesto livello X, Fondi insufficienti, etc.)

backend_pvp_legal_history.returns: actions array with legal action history

frontend_hq_page.title: QUARTIER GENERALE
frontend_hq_page.player_stats: Fame, Level, Funds, CinePass badges visible
frontend_hq_page.upgrade_buttons: Disabled with 'Bloccato' badge when requirements not met
frontend_hq_page.upgrade_costs: Shows funds and CinePass cost with color coding
frontend_hq_page.legal_history_toggle: Works with animation, shows 'Nessuna causa legale ancora' when empty
